get.description: Returns the list of active applications from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.
Returns the list of active business capabilities from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.
Returns the raw LICENSE env value (base64-encoded JSON). Empty string when not configured.
Returns the list of active data products from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

Returns a list of entities from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Optional query filters (AND combined): filterDisplayName, filterTechnicalSuitability, filterFunctionalSuitability, filterRelApplicationToBusinessCapability, filterRelApplicationToUserGroup, filterRelApplicationToProject, filterRelApplicationToDataProduct, filterRelApplicationToPlatform, filterPlatformTEMP. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.
Returns the latest version of the entity from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. 404 if not found. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

put.description: Stores or replaces the entity JSON in /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Body must be valid JSON object. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

post.description: Same semantics as PUT: Stores or replaces the entity JSON in /data/{repoName}/{branch}/{type}.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the entity in /data/{repoName}/{branch}. 404 if not found. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

patch.description: Partially update entity in /data/{repoName}/{branch}. If the entity file does not exist, creates it with the payload. Returns 204 No Content on success. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

get.description: Returns the faceted search document from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

post.description: Stage all changes in /data/{repoName}/{branch}, commit with optional message, and push to the configured remote. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data path.

Fetch and reset /data/{repoName}/{branch} to match origin. If the branch directory does not exist: pass basedOn (e.g. current branch) to create it by cloning that remote branch into the subfolder, then creating a new local branch named <branch>. Fails if the branch directory already exists when basedOn is provided.

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Branch name (directory and local branch name)

parameters.name: basedOn
parameters.description: When creating a new branch directory: remote branch to clone from (e.g. current branch). Omit for existing directories.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. branch directory already exists)

get.description: For each repository under the data root, returns its branches. Git-backed repositories include remote branches from origin with isCloned (true if the branch directory exists locally) and hasUncommittedChanges (true for the branch that is checked out in the working tree used to query). Non-GIT branches (plain directories without a Git work tree) are also listed with isGitControlled=false.

defaultRepo.description: Default repository name from server config

defaultBranch.description: Default branch name from server config

isCloned.description: True if branch directory exists locally

isGitControlled.description: True if this branch directory is inside a Git work tree

post.description: Clone a repository (OAuth URL) into /data/<repo-name>/<default-branch>. Fails if the repository directory already exists.

repoName.description: Repository name (for frontend to set selected repo)

defaultBranch.description: Default branch name (e.g. main or master)

get.description: Returns git log entries (short hash, date, message) for a specific entity file.
Returns the list of active IT components from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.

post.description: Fetch count of Application fact sheets from LeanIX. Does not return payload data; only the status with app count.

get.description: Returns the list of active platforms from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.
Returns the list of active user groups from /data/{repoName}/{branch}. Use repoName=local, branch=default for default data.
Returns a list of all users with their roles and permissions.

post.description: Creates a new user with read access to all existing repositories. Only available in Local authentication mode.

400.description: User creation not available or validation error

put.description: Update a user's role, read, and edit repository permissions.

delete.description: Removes a user from both .auth.json and .htpasswd.

post.description: Generates a new random password for the specified user. The password is returned only once and cannot be retrieved again.

password.description: The new password - shown only once
